name: Lector Pendulum, the Dracoverlord
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>王</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>レクター<ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｐ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ペンデュラム</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: Lector Pendulum, the Dragon Demon King
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
Negate the effects of face-up Pendulum Monsters while your opponent controls them.

[ Monster Effect ] 
At the start of the Damage Step, if this card battles a Pendulum Monster: Destroy both that monster and this card.
pend_eff: Negate the effects of face-up Pendulum Monsters while your opponent controls them.
mnst_eff: At the start of the Damage Step, if this card battles a Pendulum Monster: Destroy both that monster and this card.
eff: At the start of the Damage Step, if this card battles a Pendulum Monster: Destroy both that monster and this card.

mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Destroys battling monster at the start of the Damage Step
